creator: dol@ngcom.ru
text:
Second copy of userland ppp started at boot time after upgrade to 6.2 from
FreeBSD 6.1

Configured only one. Second ppp process open serial port and conflicts with
first ppp process. ppp link can't start normally.

ps -ax
..
  303  ??  Ss     0:00.02 ppp -ddial provider
  517  ??  Ss     0:00.02 ppp -ddial provider
..

How-To-Repeat: rc.conf :
---
network_interfaces="lo0 fxp0 tun0"
ifconfig_tun0=
---

--- /etc/start_if.tun0
#!/bin/sh
ppp -ddial provider
---

reboot
